AR1.justification: All artifacts were routed to the methodology-designated files and folders, with no commitments or observations misplaced.

AR2.justification: Each procedural step produced a named artifact on disk, and each step read the prior artifact before proceeding.

AR3.justification: All cross-references in the final artifact use relative paths and resolve to the correct intermediate files.

AR4.justification: All actions are idempotent and append-only, ensuring workspace coherence on re-run or extension.
